violations.text: The dishwasher located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026

The area in the kitchen behind the stove has an accumulation of soil residue, pest droppings, and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Establishment is to clean and sanitize any and all droppings. Establishment is to continue to work with pest control. Establishment is to use appropriate means of cleaning and sanitizing. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2025
The refrigerator in the basement was not in good repair. Equipment must be repaired or replaced with functional equipment. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025

The kitchen does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Establishment must install a hand sink. Establishment to send photo of installed hand sink. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2024
Facility is lacking a 3-bay sink to wash, rinse, and sanitize. 3-bay sink observed onsite and is scheduled to be installed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2024

The walls in the kitchen are constructed of painted cinderblock. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2025

Chicken Patties delivered from Karen G were observed between 117-125 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Chicken Patties were reheated to 165 before serving. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/12/2023
Establishment is lacking a 3 bay sink. Establishment shall install a 3 bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/12/2023

The tile flooring (green tiles) in dish washing was observed is in poor repair. Tiles were observed broken exposing the wood subfloor. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Walls in dish area were observed constructed of painted cinderblock. Walls in high moisture areas and food prep areas shall be constructed of a material that is non-absorbent, smooth, durable and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 03/01/2024

The facility is lacking a three bay sink to wash, rinse, and sanitize equipment, utensils, etc. The 3 compartment requirement allows for proper execution of the 3-step manual warewashing procedure. Without a 3-bay sink, all equipment and utensils must either be disposable, or returned to the production kitchen to be cleaned and sanitized. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2023
